title: IRR: The internal rate of return (IRR) is the discount rate...
summary: Evaluate or calculate the internal rate of return for project decision-making.
prompt: The internal rate of return (IRR) is the discount rate that makes the NPV of a project equal to zero.
solution: The IRR represents the rate of growth a project is expected to generate. By finding the rate at which the present value of cash inflows equals the initial investment, decision-makers can evaluate the project's profitability and compare it to the required rate of return.
